message.content:
{
  "analysis": "We have OCR resources and candidate logs, but none have been validated as exactly 262 coherent commands. The last command shown from full_frame_v2 ended at frame 190 with `w`, but the count was 529 and overcounted. The judge guidance says to run proposed extractors and inspect output before writing /app/solution.txt. I will run the move_count_anchored extractor first and inspect its count/content. If it is closer, I will iterate; I will not write /app/solution.txt until a candidate is validated.",
  "plan": "Create and run `/app/work/move_count_anchored.py` as proposed by Panel 2. It uses 1fps move-count anchors, collapses prompt continuations, applies OCR fixes, and takes the last delta commands per interval. Then inspect the candidate count and log in chunks. This is an intermediate validation step; no final solution.txt will be written yet.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/work/move_count_anchored.py <<'PY'
import glob, os, re

fs=sorted(glob.glob('/app/work/ocr/frame_*.txt'), key=lambda p:int(os.path.basename(p).split('_')[1].split('.')[0]))

fixes={
    'gY':'y','Y':'y','G':'again','g':'again',
    'move,':'move rug','open tra':'open trap',
    'ulysse':'ulysses','ulyss':'ulysses',
    'pu,':'put','pu':'put',
    'Dopen':'open','dopen':'open',
    'elose':'close','ceage':'cage','eage':'cage','ca_':'cage','ca':'cage',
    'mirro':'mirror',
    'temp':'temple','tem':'temple','tem_':'temple',
    'rin':'ring','dro':'drop',
    'get all fr':'get all from cage','get all from _':'get all from cage','get all from ca_':'get all from cage',
    'get a rom Cage':'get all from cage',
    'get lamp,clove':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,sc':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver','get lamp,clove,screw':'get lamp,clove,screwdriver',
    'put torch,scr':'put torch,screwdriver','put torch,screw':'put torch,screwdriver',
    'get huge, tor':'get huge,torch','get huge,torc':'get huge,torch','get nuge,torcn':'get huge,torch','get huge,tor':'get huge,torch',
    'get egg,sow':'get egg,sword,lamp','get egg, sword,1':'get egg,sword,lamp',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,go':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg, golden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, jade,cup,egg,gold':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'get head, Jade ,cup,egg,goiden':'get head,jade,cup,egg,golden',
    'Wind ac':'wind canary','Wind canary':'wind canary','win':'wind canary','win_':'wind canary',
    '1li':'lid','1lid':'lid','Lid':'lid','lid':'lid',
    'wW':'w','e,':'e','d.':'d','ne.':'ne',
    'n.':'n',
    'case':'case',
    'put all':'put all in case',
    'p':'put all in case',
}

def fix_cmd(s):
    s=s.strip().rstrip('._').strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return fixes.get(s,s)

def clean_prompt(s):
    s=s.strip()
    if not s.startswith('>'):
        return ''
    s=s[1:].strip().rstrip('._').strip()
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return fix_cmd(s)

frames=[]
for idx,p in enumerate(fs,1):
    txt=open(p,errors='ignore').read()
    m=re.search(r'Moves?:\s*(\d+)', txt)
    mv=int(m.group(1)) if m else None
    prompts=[]
    for line in txt.splitlines():
        c=clean_prompt(line)
        if c:
            prompts.append(c)
    frames.append({'idx':idx,'mv':mv,'prompts':prompts})

anchors=[(i,frames[i]['mv']) for i in range(len(frames)) if frames[i]['mv'] is not None]

candidates=[]
prev_i, prev_mv = 0, 0
for end_i, end_mv in anchors:
    if end_mv <= prev_mv:
        continue
    delta = end_mv - prev_mv
    interval=[]
    for j in range(prev_i, end_i+1):
        for c in frames[j]['prompts']:
            interval.append((frames[j]['idx'], c))
    # Collapse typing continuations
    collapsed=[]
    for idx,c in interval:
        if collapsed:
            li,lc=collapsed[-1]
            if c.startswith(lc) and len(c)>len(lc):
                collapsed[-1]=(idx,c)
                continue
            if lc.startswith(c) and len(lc)-len(c)<=3:
                continue
        collapsed.append((idx,c))
    # Remove pure prefixes
    kept=[]
    for n,(idx,c) in enumerate(collapsed):
        is_prefix=False
        for jj,cc in collapsed[n+1:]:
            if cc.startswith(c) and len(cc)>len(c):
                is_prefix=True
                break
        if not is_prefix:
            kept.append((idx,c))
    # Take last delta
    chosen = kept[-delta:] if delta <= len(kept) else kept
    candidates.extend(chosen)
    prev_i, prev_mv = end_i, end_mv

final=[]
for idx,c in candidates:
    if final and final[-1][1]==c:
        continue
    final.append((idx,c))

with open('/app/work/logs/move_count_anchored.log','w') as f:
    for n,(idx,c) in enumerate(final,1):
        f.write(f'{n:03d} f{idx:03d} {c}\n')

print('move_count_anchored_count', len(final))
print('expected', 262)
print('match', len(final)==262)
print('first40', final[:40])
print('last40', final[-40:])
PY
python3 /app/work/move_count_anchored.py
wc -l /app/work/logs/move_count_anchored.log
sed -n '1,140p' /app/work/logs/move_count_anchored.log
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '141,300p' /app/work/logs/move_count_anchored.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "sed -n '301,520p' /app/work/logs/move_count_anchored.log; tail -60 /app/work/logs/move_count_anchored.log
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
